summary: Tested Konekt B2B iteration 329: Product upload wizard subcategory dropdown, commission engine distribution_split, quote→invoice→order flow, subcategory request endpoints, and vendor ops select-winner pricing engine. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verified Product Upload Wizard loads correctly with category dropdown and conditional subcategory field.
seed_data_creation: Created test subcategory requests, price requests, and quotes with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified: (1) Product Upload Wizard at /admin/vendor-ops/new-product shows subcategory as dropdown when category has subcategories configured, otherwise shows disabled input. Code includes '+ Request new subcategory' option with value='__request_new__'. Currently no categories have subcategories configured in Settings Hub. (2) Commission engine POST /api/admin/commission/calculate uses tier distribution_split - affiliate channel returns affiliate_allocation > 0, direct channel returns sales_allocation > 0. (3) Quote→Invoice→Order flow: PATCH /api/admin/quotes-v2/{id}/status?status=approved generates Invoice + Order with pending_payment status. (4) POST /api/admin/catalog/subcategory-requests creates pending requests, GET returns list. (5) Vendor Ops select-winner at POST /api/vendor-ops/price-requests/{id}/select-vendor uses pricing engine - base=50000 returns sell_price with ~35% margin.

ProductUploadWizardSubcategoryDropdown.details: Wizard loads at /admin/vendor-ops/new-product. Category dropdown has 14 options. Subcategory shows as dropdown when category has subcategories (with '+ Request new subcategory' option), otherwise shows disabled input. Code verified correct.

CommissionEngineDistributionSplit.details: POST /api/admin/commission/calculate returns allocations based on tier distribution_split. Affiliate channel: affiliate_allocation > 0. Direct channel: sales_allocation > 0.

QuoteToInvoiceOrderFlow.details: PATCH /api/admin/quotes-v2/{id}/status?status=approved generates Invoice + Order. Order has current_status='pending_payment'.

SubcategoryRequestEndpoints.details: POST /api/admin/catalog/subcategory-requests creates request with status='pending'. GET returns list of pending requests.

VendorOpsSelectWinnerPricingEngine.details: POST /api/vendor-ops/price-requests/{id}/select-vendor uses calculate_sell_price from pricing engine. base_price=50000 returns sell_price with margin applied (not hardcoded).

CatalogConfigSubcategories.details: GET /api/vendor-ops/catalog-config returns categories array. Categories can have subcategories array. Currently 0 categories have subcategories configured.

PricingTierDistributionSplit.details: Settings Hub pricing_policy_tiers have distribution_split with affiliate_pct, sales_pct, referral_pct, reserve_pct.
